query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A figure with shoulder-length light hair wearing a dark long-sleeved top stands before dark draped fabric. A bright white light obscures the central facial area so that individual features are not visible. The figure's hands rest at torso level, holding a small rectangular object with a reddish reflective surface near the right hand. A metallic bracelet encircles the left wrist. The background is uniformly dark with subtle vertical folds.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A figure with shoulder-length light hair is rendered in extreme motion blur, their face dissolved into an overexposed white void while the body and background sink into crushing underexposure. The figure wears a dark top and holds a small reflective object near the waist, yet surfaces throughout are smeared and lack coherent detail. The harsh imbalance of light—simultaneously blinding at the face and suffocatingly dark elsewhere—creates a distressed atmosphere heavy with unease.
